name: Barack Obama
subject: Michelle’s advice to me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Who we are at our best | Friend --

Twelve years ago, when I was asked to give the keynote speech at the Democratic National Convention in Boston, I was just a state legislator running for the United States Senate. Michelle’s only advice to me was, “Don’t screw it up, buddy.”

But when I sat down to write, I found that I knew what I wanted to say: I wanted to talk about the larger American story -- about who we are at our best.

That night, I spoke about how the greatness of our nation was not because of the height of our skyscrapers, the power of our military, or the size of our economy. That instead, our pride is based on the simple premise that all men are created equal. That the true greatness of America is our faith in the simple dream of creating a better future for ourselves and our children.

I believed -- and still do -- that this is a dream all Americans share. I said that night that there isn’t a liberal America and conservative America, a black America and white America and Latino America and Asian America -- just the United States of America.

Now, I can’t say for certain, but I don’t think we'll hear that message coming out of Cleveland this week. In this election, the Republican Party has resisted putting forward ideas about who we are at our best. Instead, their nominee is trying to divide us. They don’t want to talk about how we can work toward a better future -- the GOP is intent on dragging us back to a past that wasn’t really as “great” as some people would have you believe.

These conventions are an opportunity every four years for our party values to stand on display to the country and to the world. This week, the Republicans have their turn. Next week, Democrats will gather in Philadelphia to show that we deserve better and we can do better than what they’re offering.

**We are going to see two very different conventions, and two very different visions for America. If you’re as committed as I am to doing everything we can to make ours a reality, pitch in $1 today to help us get there:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYwMTE5OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNjY1NDUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
When I spoke in 2004, I was campaigning on the audacity of hope -- and we can’t lose sight of that today, no matter what we hear or see from the other side. Let's remember that this week and next and every day until November.

Thanks for standing with us,

Barack

|

The Republican platform is terrifying. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43ac/1c469400/660558b/356ef15/525539370/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-18_jul-fec-SC-nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-18_jul-fec-SC-nd&utm_campaign=jul-fec-SC-nd&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Brace yourself: The Republican Party just adopted its official 2016 party platform, and it's worse than I could've ever imagined. Meet your 2016 Republican Party:
* Ron Johnson's party now fully supports Donald Trump's xenophobic proposal to build a wall along the Mexican border.
* Ron Johnson's party declared coal a "clean energy source."
* Ron Johnson's party officially endorsed the debunked and hateful practice of conversion therapy for LGBTQ Americans.
* Ron Johnson's party wants to ban all abortion access, even for victims of rape or incest.

From the top of the ticket on down, Republicans aren't backing away from Donald Trump -- they're embracing him and unifying behind him. Make no mistake: this is what we're up against. **Our next FEC deadline is just days away. Want to know the best way to disavow this platform? A Democratic Senate full of progressive candidates like Russ. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: re: Tonight in Cleveland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
The Republican convention begins. | Friend --

Tonight the Republicans begin their convention. This week will be a highlight reel of some of their most disturbing ideas. If they have their way, they’ll cut taxes on the super wealthy, roll back marriage equality, and prevent women from making our own health care decisions.

But we’re not going to let them get their way. We’re better than this, and we’re going to fight together to keep our country moving forward.

**[I hope you’ll chip in today to show the world which side you’re on. Your donation is about much more than money -- it’s a statement that we will not allow Donald Trump and the Republican Party to turn Americans against each other.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYwMTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNjY5NzgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Our nation was founded on the idea that all people are created equal, and I’m so proud that our campaign reflects that core American value. We understand that our country is stronger when we fight for each other -- no matter the color of our skin, the faith we practice, how much money we have, or who we love.

**So tonight, I’m asking you to take a stand. If you believe in your heart -- as I do -- that Donald Trump’s bigoted ideas are just plain wrong, chip in right now to stand with this team (when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker!). We’re stronger together, and together, we’re going to win:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYwMTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNjY5NzgxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 1.5 million people standing with her:**

The really distressing part of all this is that many of those people may get the impression that what they see this week represents the heart and soul of our country -- that Donald Trump and his surrogates are the best America has to offer.

But here's the thing: they're also watching us. Watching to see whether we stand by as Donald Trump claims the nomination, or whether we stand up in outrage and say we're better than this.

body:

Now, it's a yes: Senator Ron Johnson will be attending -- and speaking at -- the Republican National Convention (RNC) tonight. He just couldn't resist the chance to rub shoulders with his right-wing special interest supporters, Washington, D.C. insiders, and the GOP's standard-bearer, Donald Trump. Not only will Senator Johnson get the chance to thank his billionaire super PAC benefactors in person. He'll get a chance to endorse Donald Trump's policies from the convention stage. Will he call for a new war in the Middle East? Will he call for a ban on Muslims? Will he finally announce his position on the TPP? No matter what Senator Johnson says on that stage, we have to be ready to fight back. **[Being ready means getting closer to reaching our goal of 7,500 individual contributions by midnight tomorrow, July 20. Friend, I love going home to Nash County -- the same streets I biked on, the school where my mom taught, and our farm that I worked on are all still there. As I travel across our great state, though, it's clear that many things have gone missing. Some of our best teachers are leaving for better pay and more respect and a number of businesses are refusing to build here because of Governor McCrory's discriminatory political agenda. This is not the North Carolina I grew up in. [**Watch our new TV ad here.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202677/2fde7c66/400b28e8/156a682d/1684240504/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-home-ad?utm_campaign=vv_homead_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160719_vv_gq_homead_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202677/2fde7c66/400b28e8/156a682d/1684240504/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-home-ad?utm_campaign=vv_homead_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em16_160719_vv_gq_homead_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") This election isn't just about one bad law. name: Eric Hyers
subject: enough to buy a turkey sandwich?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---

Friend,

Greg Gianforte has already spent a record-breaking $1.2 million on TV trying to diminish Montana's success and convince voters that he has a better approach. **Help us make sure we have the resources to let people know what he is really up to.[Chip in today.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=MSaRLQ2EttPiqxqxkKDRCmOG3v%2FvFWq3)**

**Want a sampling? Here 's his tax plan:**

* Millionaires like Gianforte get an average big tax break of $54,000 - _enough to buy a brand new Lexus._
* _Many working families are offered**$5.87** \- enough to buy a turkey sandwich._

* Big, out-of-state corporations get _millions_ of dollars in taxpayer giveaways.

We can't let this become our politics | Friend --

Last night at the Republican convention, speaker after speaker accused Hillary of being a criminal.

One woman wanted to see Hillary in prison stripes. Later in the evening, the crowd chanted, "Lock her up!" as the onstage speaker happily cheered them on.

This isn't normal political behavior. Campaigns draw clear contrasts, sure -- we make arguments about character, temperament, and policy. That's all fair game.

But there's a difference between drawing a contrast and baselessly saying your opponent belongs in jail.

If we let them succeed, this could become normal. Candidates could conclude that the way to win is to say the nastiest thing you can think of, whether or not it's fair. And our politics -- and our country -- will be worse off for it.

**Stand up for what you know is right -- please chip in right now. (When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you!) ** Phil Scott Debuts First TV Ad for the August 9th Primary**
_Scott appeals to voters to join his team to "make political campaigns an example for our children...”_
Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott debuted a new 30 second television ad yesterday in which he highlights the values and priorities of his campaign for Governor, stressing his commitment to “make Vermont more affordable, the economy stronger and political campaigns an example for our children.” The ad is the first in a series, expected to air in the three weeks leading up to the August 9th election.

Scott opens the video by addressing the steady stream of misleading, negative ads from his opponent, noting: “What might pass for business as usual on Wall Street has never been in line with Vermont values.” Scott goes on to say, “While my opponent’s misleading ads are disappointing, Vermonters know the truth.

“I’m the candidate who knows what it’s like to live paycheck-to-paycheck while raising a family and working hard to grow a business and create jobs -- right here in Vermont,” Scott continues.

Scott concludes by saying, “If you want to make Vermont more affordable, the economy stronger and political campaigns an example for our children – join us. And we’ll do it the Vermont way.”

Watch the full advertisement here:
| [](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TTQxSn-t3zQ)
---

**Listen, Learn, Lead: Meet Phil Scott**

Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at www.philscott.org

subject: Can Hillary count on you to register voters in Virginia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Friend --

We’re so thankful for all the work so many of you are doing to turn out the vote for Hillary in Virginia.

One of the most critical parts of that work is registering new voters so as many Virginians as possible can make their voices heard on Election Day, and we need your help. **[Will you sign up to help with voter registration?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjYwMTg4NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNzU0Mjc3S0&mt=2&rj=ODQyNzU0Mjc3S0&rt=0)**

Yesterday, Hillary spoke at the NAACP convention in Cincinnati about the importance of protecting voting rights. She knows that in the past so many groups of people -- women, African Americans, immigrants, the elderly -- have been kept from voting in one way or another, whether through legal exclusion, voter intimidation, or just plain old bureaucracy.

It shouldn’t have happened then, and it shouldn’t happen in 2016 -- so while the Supreme Court and state legislatures may restrict voting rights, we’ll be working hard to make sure that in this election, every voice will count.

**Voters in Virginia will have a huge say in the outcome of this election. Just an hour of registering voters in your neighborhood could make all the difference, and Hillary is counting on you. Sign up here to help as many Virginians as possible register to vote:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYwMTg4NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNzU0Mjc3S0&mt=2&rj=ODQyNzU0Mjc3S0&rt=0)
Thanks!

Brian

Brian Zuzenak
Virginia State Director
Hillary for America

clean_body: | Friend -- We’re so thankful for all the work so many of you are doing to turn out the vote for Hillary in Virginia. One of the most critical parts of that work is registering new voters so as many Virginians as possible can make their voices heard on Election Day, and we need your help. Yesterday, Hillary spoke at the NAACP convention in Cincinnati about the importance of protecting voting rights. She knows that in the past so many groups of people -- women, African Americans, immigrants, the elderly -- have been kept from voting in one way or another, whether through legal exclusion, voter intimidation, or just plain old bureaucracy. It shouldn’t have happened then, and it shouldn’t happen in 2016 -- so while the Supreme Court and state legislatures may restrict voting rights, we’ll be working hard to make sure that in this election, every voice will count. Voters in Virginia will have a huge say in the outcome of this election. Just an hour of registering voters in your neighborhood could make all the difference, and Hillary is counting on you. Sign up here to help as many Virginians as possible register to vote: Thanks! Brian Brian Zuzenak Virginia State Director Hillary for America | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). body:
|
>
>
> Friend,
>
> Yesterday we saw a complete breakdown on the floor of the Republican National Convention. Multiple states called for a roll call vote to contest Donald Trump's nomination and two state delegations actually left the floor in protest. They know exactly how devastating a Trump Presidency would be for our country.
>
> But the Maryland delegation, led by rightwing activist and President of Citizens United, David Bosse, stayed out of the protest and stood by Trump.
>
> **[Please chip in right away to make sure we have what it takes to stand up to Trump, Bosse and their GOP billionaire donors in November>>> ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d9e/70cdc2ba/47f99b14/3970661/2668650798/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-trump-convention?refcode=em071916_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+chip+in+right+away+to+ma&utm_campaign=em071316&source=em071316")**
>
> Citizen's United President David Bosse is not only firmly committed to Trump, today's Baltimore Sun writes that he is also actively using his national Republican connections to controversial Republicans like Newt Gingrich and others to raise national GOP money for Chris's Republican opponent here in Maryland. It's outrageous.
>
> As we are exposed to more hateful and regressive rhetoric by tonight's GOP convention speakers we will be reminded again that this is not a joke. America -- and Maryland -- cannot afford the chaos and division that the party of Donald Trump would bring.
>
> **[That's why we are asking you to please chip in now to stop Trump and those, like our GOP opponent here in Maryland, who stand by him >> ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d9e/70cdc2ba/47f99b14/397067e/2668650798/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-trump-convention?refcode=em071916_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+are+asking+you+to+plea&utm_campaign=em071316&source=em071316")**

name: Ashley Kroetsch, HillaryClinton.com
subject: A Trump/Pence White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/servlet/MailView?ms=MjYwMjAwNzAS1&r=MjkzNzI1OTc4OTg1S0&j=ODQyNzY1NDM3S0&mt=1&rt=0).

And what you can do to stop it. | Call Team --

Two big things happened last week that tell you everything you need to know about the stakes of this election. First, Hillary and Bernie hit the trail together for the first time and announced the most progressive platform in Democratic history, one where everyone has a seat at the table.

On the other side, Donald Trump announced his VP pick, Mike Pence from Indiana. Yes, that Mike Pence, the one who tried to pass legislation making it ok for businesses to discriminate against LGBT people in his state. The one who threatened to shut down the government over defunding planned parenthood. Donald Trump has picked a running mate as divisive and bigoted as he is.

name: Rob Portman
subject: We crunched the numbers
body:
| Peter,

Yesterday, we gathered in Cleveland to thank over 500 of our hardest working volunteers and interns for all of the amazing work they have done contacting over 2.8 million Ohio voters since May of last year.

These volunteers are the engine behind the most advanced ground effort in Ohio history. Peter, I’m worried we won’t have the resources necessary to keep this effort up through Election Day.

Our team crunched the numbers and figured out that we need to raise $13,487 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track. Harry Reid's Super PAC has already spent $10 million on false ads attacking our campaign - we must fight back!

Peter, [will you give $500, $250, $100, or even $20.16 to help keep our field program the most advanced in the country and Ohio history?](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fcontribute_rob_for_senate%3Fcampaign_id%3Dc4ea742d293fe9eee1d73b344cf00d57%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26utm_campaign%3Dcw_1&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cw_1&n=1 "Donate") [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcontribute.robportman.com%2Fcontribute_rob_for_senate%3Fcampaign_id%3Dc4ea742d293fe9eee1d73b344cf00d57%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26utm_campaign%3Dcw_1&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=cw_1&n=2 "Donate Here!")

body:
| |
---
| Friend -- Yesterday during a tour of City Construction Company in Clarksburg, Bill Cole picked up the endorsement of the National Federation of Independent Business West Virginia Save America's Free Enterprise Trust. With more than 2,000 members in West Virginia, the NFIB is the voice for small businesses in the state.

Bill Cole talked about being “[all in](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.wvalways.com%2Fstory%2F32473741%2Fsmall-business-organization-endorses-bill-cole-for-governor&e=96e4479f51b1d33a4f3e4d53c984a925&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=1&test_email=1&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=1)” to grow the economy and create good-paying jobs in our state. He also [stressed](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.wdtv.com%2Fwdtv.cfm%3Ffunc%3Dview%26section%3D5-News%26item%3DNFIB-Endorses-Bill-Cole-31978&e=96e4479f51b1d33a4f3e4d53c984a925&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=2&test_email=1&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=2) the need to finish the job on regulatory reform. And, he called for [swift action](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwvmetronews.com%2F2016%2F07%2F18%2Fnfib-endorses-bill-cole-for-governor%2F&e=96e4479f51b1d33a4f3e4d53c984a925&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=3&test_email=1&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=3) as Governor to combat our state’s growing drug epidemic.
You can read more about Bill Cole’s plan to create good-paying jobs [here](http://www.billcolewv.com/nfib_endorses_cole_for_governor?e=96e4479f51b1d33a4f3e4d53c984a925&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=4&test_email=1&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=4). TEAM COLE P.S. If you could make a small [contribution](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=96e4479f51b1d33a4f3e4d53c984a925&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=5&test_email=1&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=5) of $5 to $25 today, it will help the campaign share Bill’s plan to create good paying jobs for West Virginia workers. [http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=nfib_wv_endorse&n=6)

Unacceptable. | Friend --

Last night, prominent Republican Congressman Steve King went on national news and said that white people have contributed more to civilization than any other race.

King’s comments were widely reported as a textbook example of white supremacy, and it wasn't the first time the Party of Trump has had a disturbing connection to white supremacy in recent months.

After notorious former KKK leader David Duke endorsed Trump, Trump said he “didn’t know enough” about the KKK to disavow Duke’s endorsement.

And just last week, the _New York Times_ published a shocking report detailing Trump’s campaign’s extensive relationships with white supremacists on Twitter. No wonder the campaign recently tweeted an image of Hillary and a Star of David that was widely reported to have originated on a white supremacist message board: [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYwMjA0NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNzY3NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
We're taking this seriously. Our country was founded on the idea that we are all created equal, no matter the color of our skin, the faith we practice, or who we love. We’re going to keep calling Trump out on the deplorable ideas he perpetuates, and we’re going to keep fighting to win the White House this November -- not just by a few votes, but by an overwhelming majority -- to show Trump, white supremacists, and the world in no uncertain terms that here in America, we don’t stand for hatred.

So today, I’m asking you to draw a line in the sand. Send a message to Donald Trump and the white supremacists who stand with him that we will not allow them to poison our country with their disgusting, bigoted beliefs. **We’re going to stand up for our fellow Americans -- and we’re going to elect a president who will always do the same: Hillary.** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYwMjA0NTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNzY3NzczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

body:
We're better than this | Friend --

Right now, the Republicans -- at least the ones who decided to go -- are gathering in Cleveland for the second night of their convention, so we should take a moment to discuss what that means.

Conventions are about political parties getting organized and unified, speaking with one voice about their vision for the country, and broadcasting their message to millions of Americans. They are also a time when parties raise a whole lot of money, and make no mistake -- the Republicans are going to try to do everything they can to fundraise off of the big ratings and all the outrageous attacks coming out of the mouths of Trump and his disciples.

**[We can’t let this week be a big win for them -- in fact, we need to use it to grow this team and get even stronger. Show the Republicans that their attacks only make us more dedicated to defeating them -- chip in now to stand shoulder-with-shoulder with us (and when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker!).](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYwMjE2MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNzc2OTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

With the backing of the Republican Party, Trump’s campaign raised more than $50 million last month. They’ve hired smart finance people to target every potential donor in the party. Republican leaders ranging from Paul Ryan to Ted Cruz are speaking in Cleveland. The party is indisputably coalescing around Trump as the face of their brand and as their chosen leader, and at the convention this week, they’ll ratify that.

With all eyes on him and on us, these are the most important two weeks of the general election until November 8th. Trump is ready to fight us at every turn, and he is ready to win. And the only thing standing between him and the White House is this team.

**Step up now, and let’s say it loud and clear to America: We’re better than Trump. We are stronger than him and all of his hate. And we will never let him win:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYwMjE2MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNzc2OTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- now let’s get to work,

Robby

Dear Friend –

I hope you had a great weekend.

I was hoping you would be able to join me tomorrow in Marysville for one of my whistle stops on my Big Blue Bus Ballot Bash Tour. I will be delivering my stump speech and helping our local volunteers get out the vote. We will be meeting at the Snohomish County GOP Headquarters, located at 514 Staet Ave, Suite 109, Marysville, WA 98270, between 3:30 pm and 6:30 pm. Please come help--together, we can bring much needed change to Olympia.

[You can see the details here](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/whistle_stop_tour_marysville?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vol_marysville&n=2).
It's time! Bill Bryant
